name: Tenpai Dragon Fadra
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>盃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぱい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ファドラ
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned, or at the start of the Damage Step, if a monster battles: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower FIRE Dragon monster in your GY; Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Tenpai Dragon Fadra" once per turn. Your FIRE Dragon monsters cannot be destroyed by battle. Once per turn, during the Battle Phase, you can (Quick Effect): Immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon using this card you control.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned, or at the start of the Damage Step, if a monster battles: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower FIRE Dragon monster in your GY; Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Tenpai Dragon Fadra" once per turn. Your FIRE Dragon monsters cannot be destroyed by battle. Once per turn, during the Battle Phase, you can (Quick Effect): Immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon using this card you control.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned, or at the start of the Damage Step, if a monster battles: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower FIRE Dragon monster in your GY; Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Tenpai Dragon Fadra" once per turn. Your FIRE Dragon monsters cannot be destroyed by battle. Once per turn, during the Battle Phase, you can (Quick Effect): Immediately after this effect resolves, Synchro Summon using this card you control.

action: Uses itself as a Synchro Material
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
